DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS12-L2-10001300-HSSCIENG1112-PZQ-IMR-02 • HS Engineering Design 11-12 • Computational Simulation and Engineering Design

The Twelve-Minute Model

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a teacher and a student. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main topic of the conversation?
2QUESTION 2: According to the student, what assumption does the simulation make about the people in the neighborhood?
3QUESTION 3: What does the student conclude needs to change about the model?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
